camp.title: 方块营地
camp.subtitle: 从篝火出发，收集词卡，准备最后的末地挑战
camp.subtitleEn: Start at the campfire, collect word cards, and prepare for the End.

story.title: 词语远征
story.opening: 营地的地图在篝火旁展开。每一张词卡都会让远征者更强。
story.openingEn: The camp map unfolds beside the fire. Every word card makes the explorer stronger.
story.ending: 末影龙倒下了，新的世界正在等待下一次远征。
story.endingEn: The Ender Dragon falls, and a new world waits for the next expedition.

regions.title: 草原小径
regions.subtitle: 沿着河流找到村庄
regions.subtitleEn: Follow the river to the village.

story.en: The trail is bright, but the bridge is broken. Name the blocks and rebuild the path.
story.zh: 小径很明亮，可是桥断了。说出方块的名字，重新铺好道路。

storyBeats.title: 地图上的第一条路
storyBeats.titleEn: The First Trail on the Map
storyBeats.zh: 清晨，远征者背起背包，沿着河流找到断桥。
storyBeats.en: At dawn, the explorer follows the river and finds a broken bridge.

storyBeats.title: 把桥拼回来
storyBeats.zh: 他认出木头、石头和水，用词卡把桥一块一块拼回来。
storyBeats.en: The explorer names the wood, stone, and water, then rebuilds the bridge block by block.

storyBeats.title: 迷路的史莱姆
storyBeats.zh: 一只迷路的史莱姆挡住路牌。说出最后一个词，指南针带大家回到小径。
storyBeats.en: A lost slime blocks the sign. One final word lets the compass guide everyone back to the trail.

battle.winText: 指南针找到了回家的路。
battle.winTextEn: The compass finds the way home.

regions.title: 村庄门口
regions.subtitle: 帮助村民点亮夜晚的营火
regions.subtitleEn: Help the villagers light the campfire.

story.en: The village gate opens at sunset. Build a warm campfire and protect the homes.
story.zh: 日落时村庄大门打开。生起温暖的营火，保护村民的房子。

storyBeats.title: 日落的村庄门
storyBeats.zh: 桥修好后，村庄大门在日落时打开，村民们挥手欢迎远征者。
storyBeats.en: When the bridge is fixed, the village gate opens at sunset and the villagers wave hello.

storyBeats.title: 点亮营火
storyBeats.zh: 远征者找来木头和火种，让每一间房子都有温暖的光。
storyBeats.en: The explorer gathers wood and kindling so every home has a warm light.

storyBeats.title: 守住夜晚
storyBeats.zh: 夜行僵尸靠近时，营火守护徽章让村庄保持安全。
storyBeats.en: When a night zombie comes near, the Camp Keeper Badge keeps the village safe.

battle.winText: 营火照亮了村庄，僵尸退开了。
battle.winTextEn: The campfire lights the village, and the zombie backs away.

regions.title: 深层矿洞
regions.subtitle: 带上工具，发现闪亮的钻石
regions.subtitleEn: Take your tools and find a bright diamond.

story.en: A dark tunnel hides a diamond. Use the pickaxe and torch before the creeper wakes.
story.zh: 黑暗的隧道里藏着钻石。在苦力怕醒来前使用镐和火把。

storyBeats.title: 矿洞入口
storyBeats.zh: 村庄的灯光照亮了矿洞入口，远征者带上镐和火把。
storyBeats.en: The village lights reach the mine entrance. The explorer brings a pickaxe and a torch.

storyBeats.title: 钻石的蓝光
storyBeats.zh: 矿车旁的石墙里闪出蓝光，四张词卡拼出通往钻石的路线。
storyBeats.en: A blue spark shines in the stone wall. Four word cards reveal the route to the diamond.

storyBeats.title: 小心苦力怕
storyBeats.zh: 苦力怕在远处醒来，矿石破译者能力让大家安全退出隧道。
storyBeats.en: A creeper wakes in the distance, but the Ore Breaker ability gets everyone out safely.

battle.winText: 盾牌挡住了爆炸，钻石安全了。
battle.winTextEn: The shield blocks the blast, and the diamond is safe.

regions.title: 下界传送门
regions.subtitle: 穿过熔岩湖，寻找末影之眼
regions.subtitleEn: Cross the lava lake and find an Eye of Ender.

story.en: The purple portal hums above the lava. Carry the fire charm and keep moving.
story.zh: 紫色传送门在熔岩上嗡鸣。带上抗火护符，继续前进。

storyBeats.title: 紫色传送门
storyBeats.zh: 钻石的光照亮黑曜石，紫色传送门在熔岩湖上方发出嗡鸣。
storyBeats.en: The diamond lights the obsidian, and a purple portal hums above the lava lake.

storyBeats.title: 走过玄武岩桥
storyBeats.zh: 远征者带着抗火护符，和伙伴一起走过玄武岩桥。
storyBeats.en: With the Fire Ward ready, the explorer crosses the basalt bridge with a companion.

storyBeats.title: 找到末影之眼
storyBeats.zh: 下界的火光指向一扇新的门，末影之眼就在前方。
storyBeats.en: The Nether fire points to a new doorway. The Eye of Ender is close.

battle.winText: 抗火护符让远征者穿过了熔岩。
battle.winTextEn: The fire charm carries the explorer across the lava.

regions.title: 末影龙竞技场
regions.subtitle: 集齐末地词卡，完成最后的挑战
regions.subtitleEn: Gather the End cards for the final challenge.

story.en: The End portal opens. Speak the final words, use the Eye of Ender, and face the dragon.
story.zh: 末地传送门打开了。说出最后的词语，使用末影之眼，面对末影龙。

storyBeats.title: 末地的星空
storyBeats.zh: 末影之眼打开传送门，远征者踏上漂浮的末地岛。
storyBeats.en: The Eye of Ender opens the portal, and the explorer steps onto a floating End island.

storyBeats.title: 水晶塔的光
storyBeats.zh: 水晶塔在黑色星空下闪烁，所有收集到的词卡汇成护盾。
storyBeats.en: Crystal towers shine under the dark stars as every collected word card becomes a shield.

storyBeats.title: 末影龙的最后一战
storyBeats.zh: 末影龙飞过天际。远征者说出最后的词，和伙伴一起守住希望的光。
storyBeats.en: The Ender Dragon crosses the sky. The explorer speaks the final words and protects the light of hope with every companion.

battle.winText: 所有词卡的力量汇成一道光，末影龙被击败了！
battle.winTextEn: The power of every word card becomes one light. The Ender Dragon is defeated!

collection.title: 词语收藏册
collection.description: 每完成一个节点，就为收藏册点亮一枚区域印章。
collection.descriptionEn: Clear a node to light up a new region stamp.
